title: Jorest 25 in 1 Multi Bit Screwdriver Set All in One, Magnetic Screw Driver with Torx Philips Hex Slotted Square, Birthday Tool Gifts for Men Dad Him, Pocket Repair Hand Tool for Gameboy, Bike
features: 【Ergonomic Handle and CRV Material】Screwdriver handle is made of PP and ABS material, dual-material ergonomic handle for more comfortable grip. The screwdriver bit is made of high quality CRV steel with high hardness up to HRC52°, more wear-resistant and durable.

【Multi-function Screwdriver】25-in-1 Multi-Function Screwdriver with Double End Bits Design, including T10/T15/T20/T25/T27/T30 Security Torx, Y1/Y2, H3/H4/H5/H6 Hex, PH0/PH1/PH2/PH3 Philips, SQ1/SQ2 Square, SL3/SL4/SL5/SL6 Slotted and PZ1/PZ2 Pozidriv. This multibit screwdriver meets all kinds of repairing needs, suitable for home, car maintenance, outdoor and other workplaces.

【Extension Pole】The extension pole can help reach deeper screws, adjust the length according to the needs, easily solve the repair problems. In addition, the screwdriver's handle is built-in strong magnetism to ensure that the batch head is magnetic under any circumstances and not easy to fall off.

【Portable and Compact】Each screwdriver bit is labeled with a model number for easy identification and placed in the screwdriver handle, weighing only 168g, taking up little space and easy to put into pockets, drawers, toolboxes or backpacks.

【More than just tools】 This magnetic screwdriver set will make a great Christmas stocking stuffer gift, fun tool gift, Father's Day gift, Valentine's Day gift, birthday gifts or a cool tool gift for men.

specifications_table.Features: ‎Ergonomic, Interchangeable Bit, Magnetic Tip, Non-Slip Grip, Rotating Cap
